overview.value: Moth Orchid is a common indoor orchid with long-lasting blooms. It grows in bark mix, prefers filtered light, and needs roots that can breathe.

careDifficultyDescription.value: Manageable once watering and root airflow are understood.

light.value: Bright indirect light; avoid hot direct sun.

water.value: Water when bark is nearly dry and roots turn silvery.

humidityDescription.value: Prefers moderate humidity and gentle airflow.

diseaseRiskDescription.value: Crown rot can occur if water sits in the center of the leaves.

fertilizer.value: Feed weakly every 2-4 weeks while actively growing.

tips.value: Keep the crown dry and let excess water drain fully after watering.
